property: no reachable failure path outside the construction repository
reason: This check's whole body gates on _is_construction_repo() — it audits the construction repo's committed demo census against the first-run retirement manifest, work that only exists while the root CLAUDE.md is the construction-governance body. In a deployed repo (post first-run floor swap) the gate reads False and check() returns before any failure path, so the fixture structurally cannot bite there. In the construction repository this declaration is inert and the bite stays required.
